languages.text: "Госпожа Войгтвир, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}безусловно, права{/d}". {n}Голос Камиллы звучит на удивление твердо.{/n} "Ее компетенции в воинском искусстве неоспоримы".

traits.locale_text: "Госпожа Войгтвир, безусловно, права". {n}Голос Камиллы звучит на удивление твердо.{/n} "Ее компетенции в воинском искусстве неоспоримы".
traits.speaker: KamilleDrivestem

languages.text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

languages.text: “维特威尔女士{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}所言极是{/d}。”{n}卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔的声音出人意料地坚定。{/n}“她在战争艺术上的造诣毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

traits.locale_text: “维特威尔女士{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}所言极是{/d}。”{n}卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔的声音出人意料地坚定。{/n}“她在战争艺术上的造诣毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: « Dame Voigtvir a {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}parfaitement raison{/d}. {n}La voix de Camilla Drivestem est étonnamment ferme.{/n} Ses compétences martiales sont indéniables. »
languages.original_text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

traits.locale_text: « Dame Voigtvir a {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}parfaitement raison{/d}. {n}La voix de Camilla Drivestem est étonnamment ferme.{/n} Ses compétences martiales sont indéniables. »

languages.text: «Lady Voigtvir tiene {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}toda la razón{/d}». {n}La voz de Camilla Drivestem es sorprendentemente firme.{/n} «Su competencia en el arte de la guerra es indiscutible».
languages.original_text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

traits.locale_text: «Lady Voigtvir tiene {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}toda la razón{/d}». {n}La voz de Camilla Drivestem es sorprendentemente firme.{/n} «Su competencia en el arte de la guerra es indiscutible».

languages.text: "Leydi Voigtvir {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}bütünüyle haklı{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem'in sesi, şaşırtıcı derecede kararlı çıkıyor.{/n} "Savaş sanatındaki yetkinliği inkâr edilemez."
languages.original_text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Voigtvir {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}bütünüyle haklı{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem'in sesi, şaşırtıcı derecede kararlı çıkıyor.{/n} "Savaş sanatındaki yetkinliği inkâr edilemez."

languages.text: "Lady Voigtvir hat {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}völlig recht{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestems Stimme klingt erstaunlich fest.{/n} "Ihre Kompetenz in der Kunst des Krieges ist unbestritten."
languages.original_text: "Lady Voigtvir is {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}entirely correct{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestem's voice sounds surprisingly firm.{/n} "Her competence in the art of war is undeniable."

traits.locale_text: "Lady Voigtvir hat {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}völlig recht{/d}." {n}Camilla Drivestems Stimme klingt erstaunlich fest.{/n} "Ihre Kompetenz in der Kunst des Krieges ist unbestritten."

languages.text: 「ヴォイグヴィル女史は{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}完全に正しい{/d}。」{n}カミリア・ドライブステムの口調は、意外にも堅い。{/n}「彼女の戦争術の腕前は、疑う余地がない。」
